recommendations.title: When the Bough Breaks
recommendations.overview: A surrogate mother harbors a deadly secret desire for a family of her own with the husband who is expecting to raise her child.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: You're Next
recommendations.overview: When the Davison family comes under attack during their wedding anniversary getaway, the gang of mysterious killers soon learns that one of their victims harbors a secret talent for fighting back.

recommendations.title: Dark Water
recommendations.overview: A woman in the midst of an unpleasant divorce moves to an eerie apartment building with her young daughter. The ceiling of their apartment has a dark and active leak.

recommendations.title: Ripper Untold
recommendations.overview: A detective and a medical examiner join forces to solve a series of horrific murders in Victorian London - but one of them harbors a deadly secret.

recommendations.title: Eloise
recommendations.overview: Four friends break into an abandoned insane asylum in search of a death certificate which will grant one of them a large inheritance. However, finding it soon becomes the least of their worries in a place haunted by dark memories.

recommendations.title: The 4th Floor
recommendations.overview: A woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor.

recommendations.title: Dead Sea
recommendations.overview: Stranded in the open sea after a fatal accident, a young woman and her two friends are rescued by a fishing vessel's captain, unaware that the ship harbors a chilling secret.

recommendations.title: Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A woman's carefully constructed life is upended when an unwelcome shadow from her past returns, forcing her to confront the monster she's evaded for two decades.

recommendations.title: Results
recommendations.overview: Two mismatched personal trainers' lives are upended by the actions of a new, wealthy client.
